name: Crystron Quan
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>水晶機巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クリストロン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－クオン
desc: During your opponent's Main or Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon 1 non-Tuner monster from your hand, but its effects are negated (if any), and if you do, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Machine Synchro Monster using only that monster and this card. You can only use this effect of "Crystron Quan" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your opponent's Main or Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon 1 non-Tuner monster from your hand, but its effects are negated (if any), and if you do, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Machine Synchro Monster using only that monster and this card. You can only use this effect of "Crystron Quan" once per turn.
eff: During your opponent's Main or Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon 1 non-Tuner monster from your hand, but its effects are negated (if any), and if you do, immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Machine Synchro Monster using only that monster and this card. You can only use this effect of "Crystron Quan" once per turn.

action: Uses itself as a Synchro Material
Can only use certain Synchro Materials
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
